trans-unit.target: You need to select at least one element.

trans-unit.note: Do not remove! Used for datatables rendering.

trans-unit.target: This is how the part appeared before %timestamp%. Please note that this feature is experimental, so the info may not be correct.
Each line will be interpreted as a name of an element, which will be created. You can create nested structures by indentations.
Generation date of the backup codes
Do you really want to proceed?

This will disable all active two-factor authentication methods of the user and delete the backup codes!
The user will have to set up all two-factor authentication methods again and print new backup codes!

Only do this if you are absolutely sure about the identity of the user (seeking help), otherwise the account could be compromised by an attacker!
Do you really want to delete this stock? This can not be undone!

This can not be undone!
Sub elements will be moved upwards.
Do you really want to delete this parameter?
This can take a moment. If this message do not disappear, try to reload the page.
Please activate Javascript to use all features!
This can take a while. If this messages stays for a long time, try to reload the page.
Source, downloads, bug reports, to-do-list etc. can be found on GitHub project page
Help and tips can be found in Wiki the GitHub page
You need a webcam and give permission to use the scanner function. You can input the barcode code manually below.
Really undo change / revert to timestamp?
Do you really want to undo the given change / reset the element to the given timestamp?
This email was sent automatically by
Do not answer to this email.
somebody (hopefully you) requested a reset of your password. If this request was not made by you, ignore this mail.
If this does not work for you, go to %url% and enter the following info
The reset token will be valid until %date%.
Current IPN specification of the part
Next possible IPN specification based on an identical part description
IPN prefix of direct category empty, specify one in category "%name%"
IPN prefix of direct category and part-specific increment
IPN prefixes with hierarchical category order of parent-prefix(es)
IPN prefixes with hierarchical category order of parent-prefix(es) and part-specific increment
Please create part at first and assign it to a category: with existing categories and their own IPN prefix, the IPN for the part can be suggested automatically
Do you really want to delete this price? This can not be undone.
Do you really want to delete this distributor info? This can not be undone!
Do you really want to delete this [part]?
This [part] and any associated information (like attachments, price information, etc.) will be deleted. This can not be undone!
This is a trusted computer (if this is enabled, no further two-factor queries are performed on this computer)
Enter the 6-digit code from your Authenticator app or one of your backup codes if the Authenticator is not available.
Remember me (should not be used on shared computers)

You are accessing this page using the insecure HTTP method, so U2F will most likely not work (Bad Request error message). Ask an administrator to set up the secure HTTPS method if you want to use security keys.
Please plug in your security key and press its button!

With the help of a U2F/FIDO compatible security key (e.g. YubiKey or NitroKey), user-friendly and secure two-factor authentication can be achieved. The security keys can be registered here, and if two-factor verification is required, the key only needs to be inserted via USB or typed against the device via NFC.
To ensure access even if the key is lost, it is recommended to register a second key as backup and store it in a safe place!
Print out these codes and keep them in a safe place!

If you no longer have access to your device with the Authenticator App (lost smartphone, data loss, etc.) you can use one of these codes to access your account and possibly set up a new Authenticator App. Each of these codes can be used once, it is recommended to delete used codes. Anyone with access to these codes can potentially access your account, so keep them in a safe place.
Do you really want to disable the Authenticator App?

If you disable the Authenticator App, all backup codes will be deleted, so you may need to reprint them.
Also note that without two-factor authentication, your account is no longer as well protected against attackers!
Download an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator oder FreeOTP Authenticator)
Scan the adjacent QR Code with the app or enter the data manually
Enter the generated code in the field below and confirm
Print out your backup codes and store them in a safe place
Backup codes disabled. Setup authenticator app to enable backup codes.
You can use these backup codes to access your account even if you lose the device with the Authenticator App. Print out the codes and keep them in a safe place.
This will delete all previous codes and generate a set of new codes. This cannot be undone. Remember to print out the new codes and store them in a safe place!
If you remove this key, then no more login with this key will be possible. If no security keys remain, two-factor authentication will be disabled.

When checking the second factor, the current computer can be marked as trustworthy, so no more two-factor checks on this computer are needed. If you have done this incorrectly or if a computer is no longer trusted, you can reset the status of all computers here.
You will have to perform two-factor authentication again on all computers. Make sure you have your two-factor device at hand.
Download of the external attachment failed.
Can not save changed. Please check your input!
Could not create element. Please check your input!
CSFR Token invalid. Please reload this page or contact an administrator if this message stays.
No entities matching the range found.
Target element could not be found in DB!
You have to undelete the element before you can undo this change!
This log entry can not be undone!
Error during creation: Please check your inputs!
No element found for the given barcode.
Reset request was successful! Please check your emails for further instructions.
Username or Token invalid! Please check your input.
Password was reset successfully. You can now login with your new password.
All two-factor authentication methods were successfully disabled.
No security key with this ID is existing.
You can not delete the security keys of other users!
When this option is activated, the whole import process is aborted if invalid data is detected. If not selected, the invalid data is ignored and the importer will try to import the other elements.
An attachment marked private can only be accessed by authenticated users with the proper permission. If this is activated no thumbnails are generated and access to file is less performant.
You can specify an URL to an external file here, or input an keyword which is used to search in built-in resources (e.g. footprints)
If you select Twig here, the content field is interpreted as Twig template. See Twig documentation and Wiki for more information.
You can specify multiple IDs (e.g. 1,2,3) and/or a range (1-3) here to generate labels for multiple elements at once.
Loading markdown. If this message does not disappear, try to reload the page.
Password reset for your Part-DB account
A element can not be its own parent.
The parent can not be one of the children of itself.
The [storage_location] was marked as full, so you can not add a new [part] to it.
The [storage_location] was marked as "only existing", so you can not add new [part] to it.
The [storage_location] was marked as "single [part]", so you can not add a new [part] to it.
The part is currently and in the foreseeable future in production
The part was announced but is not available yet.
The part is discontinued and not produced anymore.
The product has reached its end-of-life and the production will be stopped soon.
The part is currently in production but is not recommended for new designs.
The manufacturing status of the part is not known.
You can not withdraw yourself the "change permission" permission, to prevent that you lockout yourself accidentally.

You can specify a comma separated list of file extension or mime types, which an uploaded file must have when assigned to this attachment type. To allow all supported image files, you can use image/*.
If this option is activated, this element can not be assigned to a [part] property. Useful if this element is just used for grouping.
If this option is activated, the [footprint] property is disabled for all [[part]] with this [category].
If this option is activated, the [manufacturer] property is disabled for all [[part]] with this [category].
If this option is activated, no automatic links to datasheets are created for [[part]] with this [category].
If this option is activated, the [part] properties are disabled for [[part]] with this [category].
This field is used to determine a link to the part on the company page. %PARTNUMBER% will be replaced with the order number.

Element 1 Element 1.1 Element 1.1.1 Element 1.2 Element 2 Element 3
Element 1 -> Element 1.1 Element 1 -> Element 1.2
If this option is activated, all values with this unit will be rounded to whole numbers.
If this option is activated, values are outputted with SI prefixes (e.g. 1,2kg instead of 1200g)
If this option is selected, it is neither possible to add new [[part]] to this storelocation or to increase the amount of existing [[part]].
If this option is activated, it is not possible to add new [[part]] to this storelocation, but the amount of existing [[part]] can be increased.
If this option is activated, only a single [part] (with every amount) can be assigned to this [storage_location]. Useful for small SMD boxes or feeders.
You can select a [measurement_unit] here, which a [part] must have to be able to be assigned to this [storage_location]
If this option is enabled, every direct member of this group, has to configure at least one second-factor for authentication. Recommended for administrative groups with much permissions.
Element "%PATH%" still contains parts! You have to move the parts, to be able to delete this element.
Attachment type still contains attachments. Change their type, to be able to delete this attachment type.
Currency still contains price details. You have to change their currency to be able to delete this element.
Users still uses this group! Change their group, to be able to delete this group.
File extension not allowed for this attachment type.
Error: Outer diameter must be greater than inner diameter!
This calculator gives you an estimation, how many parts are remaining on an SMD reel. Measure the noted the dimensions on the reel (or use some of the presets) and click "Update" to get an result.
Your password needs to be changed! Please set a new password.
Do you really want to delete these parts?
These parts and any associated information (like attachments, price information, etc.) will be deleted. This can not be undone!
Do you really want to delete this attachment?
Range is completely in Value range
Number of [[part]] with this element or its sub elements
Only allow read operations on data
Allow changing parts and data structures
Permission preset applied successfully. Check if the new permissions fit your needs.
The currency is unsupported by the exchange rate provider. Check your exchange rate provider configuration.
Unable to retrieve the exchange rate. Check your exchange rate provider configuration.
Do you really want to delete this BOM entry?
This [part] represents the builds of this [project], which are stored somewhere.
This [part] represents the builds of the following [project] and is associated with it
Move parts from lot to another lot
You can set a comment here describing why you are doing this operation (e.g. for what you need the parts). This info will be saved in the log.
The permission schema of your user were upgraded to the latest version.

This gallery lists all available built-in footprint images. If you want to use them in an attachment, type in the name (or a keyword) in the path field of the attachment and select the image from the dropdown select.
Build not possible: Parts not stocked
The following [[part]] have not enough stock to build this [project] at least once:
You have enough stocked to build %max_builds% builds of this [project].
The current [project] status is "%project_status%". You should check if you really want to build the [project] with this status!
You do not have enough [[part]] stocked to build this [project] %number_of_builds% times. The following [[part]] have missing instock:
Can not build project. Check input!

Choose from which [[part_lot]] the stock to build this [project] should be taken (and in which amount). Check the checkbox for each BOM Entry, when you are finished withdrawing the [[part]], or use the top checkbox to check all boxes at once.
Add builds to project builds part
A PCRE-compatible regular expression, which a part name have to match.
A prefix suggested when entering the IPN of a part.
Use -> to create nested structures, e.g. "Node 1->Node 1.1"
Save and create new empty part
Your database is still empty. You might want to read the documentation or start to creating the following data structures:
Or you can directly create a new part.
This box will hide as soon as you have created your first part.
For questions about Part-DB use the discussion forum
Your user uses single sign-on (SSO). You can not change the password and 2FA settings here. Configure them on your central SSO provider instead!
The form below is only for log in with a local user. If you want to log in via single sign-on, press the button above.
Errors during import. This is most likely caused by some invalid data.
Could not determine the format from the given file!
File invalid. Please check that you have selected the right format!
If you select a value here, all imported parts will be assigned to this category. No matter what was set in the data.

If this is selected, datastructures (like categories, footprints, etc.) which does not exist in the database yet, will be automatically created. If this is not selected, only existing data structures will be used, and if no matching data structure is found, the part will get assigned nothing
The delimiter used to mark different levels in data structure pathes like category, footprint, etc.
See the documentation for more information on the file format.
You can import parts from existing files with this tool. The parts will be directly written to database, so please check your file beforehand for correct content before uploading it here.
Mark all imported parts as "Needs review"
If this option is selected, then all parts will be marked as "Needs review", no matter what was set in the data.
Clear existing BOM entries before importing
Selecting this option will remove all existing BOM entries in the project and overwrite them with the imported BOM file!
File could not be imported. Please check that you have selected the right file type. Error message: %message%
Validation error! Please check your data!
Only the owner can withdraw or add stock to this lot.
Not allowed to do the desired action. Please check your permissions and the owner of the [[part_lot]].
In stock less than desired (total amount < min. amount)
Show email on public profile page
If the last digits of the IP address are missing, then the GDPR mode is enabled, in which IP addresses are anynomized.
The request was blocked. No action should be required.
An error occured during your request.
Do you really want to delete the log entry?
If this is an element history entry, this breaks the element history! This can lead to unexpected results when using the time travel function.
An error occurred during the registration of the security key. Try again or use another security key!
No text content given! The labels will remain empty.
Do you really want to impersonate this user?

This will be logged. You should only do this with a good reason.
Please note, that you can not impersonate a disabled user. If you try you will get an "Access Denied" message.
The information provider used to create this part.
Select the providers in which should be searched.
The alternative names given here, are used to find this element based on the results of the information providers.
A new version of Part-DB is available. Check it out here
Only administrators can see this message.

Using an API token, other applications can access Part-DB with your user rights, to perform various actions using the Part-DB REST API. If you delete an API token here, the application, which uses the token, will no longer be able to access Part-DB on your behalf.
You can restrict, what the API token can access. The access is always limited by the permissions of your user.
After this date, the token is not usable anymore. Leave empty if the token should never expire.
Please save it. You will not be able to see it again!
If this option is selected, the given withdraw quantities are used as given, no matter if more or less [[part]] are actually required to build this [project].
Do you really want to delete this API token?
The application, which uses this API token, will no longer have access to Part-DB. This action can not be undone!
You are not allowed to create new entities of this type! Please choose a pre-existing one.
You can select here, how the chosen part is related to this part.
Associations from this part to others
Associations to this part from others
Do you really want to delete this association? This can not be undone.
If this lot already have a barcode (e.g. put there by the vendor), you can input its content here, to easily scan it.
This element was newly created and was not persisted to the database yet.
Do you really want to merge %other% into %target%?
%other% will be deleted, and the part will be saved with the shown information.
Merge other part into this one (delete other part, keep this one)
Merge this part into other one (delete this part, keep other one)
Update existing part from info provider
Data not saved yet. Review the changes and click save to persist the new data.
Permissions required by other permissions were missing. This was corrected. Please check if the permissions are as you intended.

Please note that some permission operations depend on each other. If you encounter a warning that missing permissions were corrected and a permission was set to allow again, you have to set the dependent operation to forbid too. The dependents can normally found right of an operation.
This field allows you to specify the real date, when the stock operation actually was performed, and not just when it was logged. This value is saved in the extra field of the log entry.
Delete this lot, if it becomes empty
An error occurred while communicating with the information provider. Check the configuration for this provider and refresh the OAuth tokens if possible.
By default, the visibility to the EDA software is automatically determined. With this checkbox, you can force the part to be visible or invisible.
You tried to withdraw/add an amount of zero! No action was performed.
Access denied! Please log in to continue.
This part (or a very similar one) was already found in the database. Please check if it is the same and if you want to create it again!
Update existing part from info provider
Category could not be automatically determined by the info provider. Review the data and select the category manually.
User defined barcode (configured at part lot)
EIGP 114 barcode (e.g. the datamatrix codes on digikey and mouser orders)
Info mode (Decode barcode and show its contents, but do not redirect to part)
Profile name must not be empty!
You can register for an API key on https://partner.element14.com/.
The store domain to retrieve the data from. This decides the language and currency of results. See here for a list of valid domains.
You can get an API token and secret on https://developers.tme.eu/en/.
You can register for an API key on https://eu.mouser.com/api-hub/.
The maximum amount of results for a single search. Can not be higher than 50.
This allows you to only show parts with a certain availability and/or compliance.
Only in stock, RoHS compliant parts
Warning: LCSC does not provide an official API. This provider utilizes the webshop API. LCSC did not intend the use of this API, and it could break any time, so use it on your own risk.
The maximum size of files that can be uploaded. Please note that this is also limited by PHP configuration.
With this option users can download external files into Part-DB by providing an URL. Attention: This can be a security issue, as it might allow users to access intranet ressources via Part-DB!
Download new attachment URLs by default
Name of this Part-DB installation. The value is shown in nav bar and titles.
Save which fields of an element were changed in log entries
Save the old data in log entries on element changes
Save the new data in log entries on element change/creation
Save removed data in log entries on element deletion
With this option, you can specify for which actions, users are enforced to give a reason, which will be logged in history.
If a user does not have an avatar image specified, use the avatar from Gravatar based on the user email. This causes the browser to load pictures from a third-party!
Part-DB regularly checks if a new version is available on GitHub. Disable this here, if you do not want this or if your server can not connect to the internet.

The currency that is used to store price information and exchange rates in. This currency is assumed, when no currency is set for a price information. Please note that the currencies are not converted, when changing this value. So changing the default currency after you already added price information, will result in wrong prices!

This value determines the depth of the category tree, that is visible inside KiCad. 0 means that only the top level categories are visible. Set to a value > 0 to show more levels. Set to -1, to show all parts of Part-DB inside a sigle cnategory in KiCad.
The menus which appear at the sidebar by default. Order of items can be changed via drag & drop.
If this is enabled, all top-level categories, footprints, etc. will be put under a single root node. If disabled, the top-level categories will be put directly into the menu.
The default page size on full page tables. Set to -1 to show all items by default without pagination.
The columns to show by default in part tables. Order of items can be changed via drag & drop.
If this is not set, distributors where the prices are 0 will be discarded as invalid

If enabled, the provider tries to convert the unstructured descriptions of OEMSecrets into structured parameters. Each parameter in the description should have the form "...;name1:value1;name2:value2"
There are no entities to export!
Change location (only for parts with single lot)
This part contains more than one stock. Change the location by hand to select, which stock to choose.
Reichelt.com offers no official API, so this info provider webscrapes the website to extract info. It could break at any time, use it at your own risk.
Pollin.de offers no official API, so this info provider webscrapes the website to extract info. It could break at any time, use it at your own risk.
Root nodes redirect to new entity pages
The number of results to get from Octopart while searching (please note that this counts towards your API limits)
Set to false to include non-authorized offers in the results
If you need exchange rates between non-euro currencies, you can input an API key from fixer.io here.
Define your own user help text for the Regex format specification.
Add incremental suffix to IPN, if the value is already used by another part
Use part description to find next available IPN
The number of digits used for the incremental numbering of parts in the IPN (Internal Part Number) suggestion system.
Show the image overlay with attachment details on hovering over the part image gallery.
The value of this parameter can be overridden by setting the environment variable "%env%".
Settings are invalid. Please check your input!
Configure how CSV columns map to BOM fields
Priority Tip: Lower numbers = higher priority. Default priority is 10. Use priorities 1-9 for most important fields, 10+ for normal priority.
Select field mappings to see summary
Import session has expired. Please upload your file again.
Line %line%: Required field "%field%" is missing or empty. Please ensure this field is mapped and contains data.
Line %line%: Designator field contains no valid component references. Expected format: "R1,C2,U3" or "R1, C2, U3".
Line %line%: Some component references may have unusual format: %designators%. Expected format: "R1", "C2", "U3", etc.
Line %line%: Duplicate component references found: %designators%. Each component should be referenced only once per line.
Line %line%: Quantity "%quantity%" is not a valid number. Please enter a numeric value (e.g., 1, 2.5, 10).
Line %line%: Quantity must be greater than 0, got %quantity%.
Line %line%: Quantity %quantity% seems unusually high. Please verify this is correct.
Line %line%: Quantity %quantity% is not a whole number, but you have %count% component references. This may indicate a mismatch.

Line %line%: Mismatch between quantity and component references. Quantity: %quantity%, References: %count% (%designators%). These should match. Either adjust the quantity or check your component references.
Line %line%: Part-DB ID "%id%" is not a valid number. Please enter a numeric ID.
Line %line%: Part-DB ID must be greater than 0, got %id%.
Line %line%: Part-DB ID %id% not found in database. The component will be imported without linking to an existing part.
Line %line%: Successfully linked to Part-DB part "%name%" (ID: %id%).
Line %line%: No component name/designation provided (MPN, Designation, or Value). Component will be named "Unknown Component".
Line %line%: Package name "%package%" is unusually long. Please verify this is correct.
Line %line%: Package "%package%" contains library prefix. This will be automatically removed during import.
Line %line%: Field "%field%" contains non-numeric value "%value%". Please enter a valid number.
Import summary: %total% total entries, %valid% valid, %invalid% with issues.
Found %count% validation error(s) that must be fixed before import can proceed.
Found %count% warning(s). Please review these issues before proceeding.
The following errors must be fixed before the import can proceed:
The following warnings should be reviewed before proceeding:
All entries are valid and ready for import!
Please fix the validation errors before proceeding with the import.
The items to show at the homepage. Order can be changed via drag & drop.
These providers will be preselected for searches in part providers.
Configure field mappings that will be applied to all selected parts. For example: "MPN → LCSC + Mouser" means search LCSC and Mouser providers using each part's MPN field.
Define which part fields to search with which info providers. Multiple mappings will be combined.
Select which info providers to search when parts have this field.
Select a field to search by
SPN (Supplier Part Number) is recommended for better results. Add a mapping for each supplier to use their SPNs.
Prefetch details for all results. This will take longer, but will speed up workflow for updating parts.
Editing part as part of bulk import
View and manage all your bulk import jobs. To create a new job, select parts and click "Bulk import from info providers".
Create your first bulk import job by selecting multiple parts in a part table and select the "Bulk info provider import" option.
Are you sure you want to delete this job?
Follow these steps to efficiently update your parts:
Click "Update Part" to edit a part with the supplier data
Review and modify the part information as needed. Note: You need to click "Save" twice to save the changes.
Click "Complete" to mark the part as done and return to this overview
Are you sure you want to stop this job?
Lower numbers = higher priority. Same priority = combine results. Different priorities = try highest first, fallback if no results.
Lower numbers = higher priority. Same priority = combine results. Different priorities = try highest first, fallback if no results.
Example: Priority 1: "LCSC SPN → LCSC", Priority 2: "MPN → LCSC + Mouser", Priority 3: "Name → All providers"
Re-search for parts using updated information (e.g., new MPNs). Uses the same field mappings as the original search.
Research this part with updated information
The languages to show in the language drop-down menu. Order can be changed via drag & drop. Leave empty to show all available languages.
Tables should include children nodes by default
If checked, the part tables for categories, footprints, etc. should include all parts of child categories. If not checked, only parts that strictly belong to the clicked node are shown.
You need to reconnect OAuth for following providers: %provider% You can do this in the provider info list.
When enabled, the part’s description is used to find existing parts with the same description and to determine the next available IPN by incrementing their numeric suffix for the suggestion list.
A PCRE-compatible regular expression every IPN has to fulfill. Leave empty to allow everything as IPN.

The synonyms systems allow overriding how Part-DB call certain things. This can be useful, especially if Part-DB is used in a different context than electronics. Please note that this system is currently experimental, and the synonyms defined here might not show up at all places.
Type synonyms allow you to replace the labels of built-in data types. For example, you can rename "Footprint" to something else.
e.g. Format: 3–4 alphanumeric segments (any number) separated by "-", followed by "-" and 4 digits, e.g., PCOM-RES-0001
The global IPN prefix, common across all parts
The IPN prefix that should be used, if a category has no prefix defined.
The separator character used to separate the IPN number from the prefix.
The separator character used to separate different levels of category prefixes.
If enabled, an option for to generate IPN with this global prefix, shared across parts in all categories.
